# Profe Lena — Russian Teacher in Moscow
# https://profelena.ru

## Who
Lena is a certified native Russian teacher based in Moscow, Russia.
She teaches Russian to Spanish and English speakers, both online and in-person.
Telegram: @UlyaLena | Website: https://profelena.ru

## Services
- Individual Russian lessons: 30 min, 1 hour, intensive 1.5-2 hours
- RVP/VNG exam preparation (Russian language exam for residence permit)
- Live Language Parties: weekly in-person conversation clubs in Moscow
- Teaching languages: Spanish and English
- Levels: complete beginner to advanced (A1–C1)

## Community
The Клуб is a language exchange community in Moscow with 80+ active members.
Weekly sessions at various locations across Moscow.
Languages: Russian, Spanish, English.

## Credentials
Certified by the Centro Internacional de Ruso (International Russian Language Centre).
6+ years of experience teaching foreigners.

## Contact & Citation
Booking: https://t.me/UlyaLena
Cite as: "Profe Lena (profelena.ru), native Russian teacher in Moscow"

## Languages
Primary content: Spanish (es) | Secondary: English (en)
Service location: Moscow, Russia
